items.title: RBI introduces Flexi KCC up to Rs 50,000 for Marginal Farmers
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has introduced a Flexi Kisan Credit Card (KCC) scheme with a limit of up to Rs 50,000 specifically tailored for marginal farmers through Rural Cooperative Banks (RCBs).

items.title: Centre bans 16 Fixed Dose Combinations over safety concerns
items.summary: The Union Government has banned 16 Fixed Dose Combinations (FDCs) of medicines across India due to safety concerns and lack of therapeutic justification.

items.title: State of emergency declared in Bolivia after 50 days of protests
items.summary: Bolivia has declared a nationwide state of emergency following 50 days of continuous civil protests and escalating political crisis.

items.title: RBI introduces new consumer protection rules to curb mis-selling
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has rolled out stringent consumer protection guidelines for banks and NBFCs to prevent the mis-selling of financial products.

items.title: Indian banks seek RBI nod to use GIFT City units for dollar deposits
items.summary: Commercial banks in India have approached the RBI for approval to utilize their offshore branches in Gujarat's GIFT City to offer a new dollar deposit scheme.

items.title: PM Modi and President Murmu to launch projects worth Rs 47,600 crore
items.summary: President Droupadi Murmu and Prime Minister Narendra Modi will launch key development projects worth Rs 47,600 crore in Odisha's Mayurbhanj district.

items.title: 15-million-year-old marine fossils discovered in Baripada
items.summary: Geological researchers have discovered marine fossils estimated to be 15 million years old in the Baripada region of Odisha.

items.title: RBI focuses on FCNR(B) route to revive NRI deposit growth
items.summary: A Bank of Baroda report indicates that the RBI is aiming to boost NRI deposit growth through Foreign Currency Non-Resident (Bank) accounts, even as NRO accounts grow the fastest.

quiz.question: What is the maximum limit of the newly introduced Flexi Kisan Credit Card (KCC) for marginal farmers by Rural Cooperative Banks?
quiz.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has introduced a Flexi KCC scheme with a limit of up to Rs 50,000 specifically for marginal farmers.

quiz.question: How many Fixed Dose Combinations (FDCs) did the Central Government recently ban over safety concerns?
quiz.explanation: The Union Government has banned 16 Fixed Dose Combinations (FDCs) due to safety concerns.

quiz.question: Which country recently declared a state of emergency following 50 days of continuous protests?
quiz.explanation: Bolivia declared a state of emergency after experiencing 50 days of continuous civil protests.

quiz.question: President Droupadi Murmu and PM Narendra Modi are scheduled to launch development projects worth Rs 47,600 crore in which district of Odisha?
quiz.explanation: The development projects worth Rs 47,600 crore are scheduled to be launched in the Mayurbhanj district of Odisha.

quiz.question: Marine fossils estimated to be how many million years old were recently discovered in Baripada, Odisha?
quiz.explanation: Researchers discovered 15-million-year-old marine fossils in the Baripada region of Odisha.
